nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id, b.status, COUNT(DISTINCT ea_p.script_id) AS scripts_evaluated, COUNT(DISTINCT ea_c.script_id) AS scripts_coordinated
FROM board b
JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id
JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = bc.employee_id
JOIN evaluator_pool ep ON ep.board_id = b.id AND ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE
JOIN script_assignment sa_p ON sa_p.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id AND sa_p.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND sa_p.is_active = TRUE
JOIN script_assignment sa_c ON sa_c.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id AND sa_c.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' AND sa_c.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY b.id, b.status
ORDER BY b.status DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Invalid value: script_assignment.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' is not a valid value for this column. Allowed values: PRIMARY, REVAL, REVIEW, THIRD. Tip — this column is constrained to a fixed set of values by a CHECK constraint; only the listed values can ever exist in the data.
